where_to_store: Keep in git only if they are canonical source pages; otherwise move to src/pages and generate outputs
why: Root generated copies are volatile and duplicate build output.

where_to_store: Keep outside git or keep only in release bundles
why: Build outputs are reproducible and noisy in diffs.

where_to_store: Keep outside git by default; allow only required deploy artifact policy
why: Avoid drift between source and generated files.
Final human-readable audit output is useful baseline; intermediates are noise.

where_to_store: Keep outside git unless it is approval baseline
why: Diff dumps are large and ephemeral.
Binary bundles bloat repo and duplicate extracted content.

where_to_store: Keep in git in curated folder (max 5-10 key baselines)
why: Need visual baseline for regressions; keep minimal set only.
High churn and large volume; no long-term signal.

where_to_store: Archive-only; keep compressed snapshots outside active tree
why: Historical safety net, not active source.

where_to_store: Outside git unless promoted to documented prototype

why: These docs define runtime and release process and should be versioned.
